note: Generated by scripts/generate-tool-catalogue.ts. Do not hand-edit; edit src/tools/catalogue-data.ts and re-run `npm run docs:tools`.

tools.name: await_decision
tools.description: Open a decision and block until a response arrives or the timeout fires. 30-min ceiling. If default_option_id is set, the call resolves with the default on timeout; otherwise it errors.
side_effects: creates a row in the decisions table
publishes a `decision_request` event
blocks the calling tool until a response arrives or the timeout fires
on timeout with `default_option_id`, writes a `switch-default` response + `decision_response` event
error_modes: timeout with no default → isError (`decision <id> timed out and no default was provided`)

tools.name: emit_event
tools.description: Publish an event. Validates payload against the event taxonomy, persists, fans out to subscribers.
side_effects: writes one row to the events table
fans out a `notifications/event/published` MCP notification to every subscribed session
error_modes: unknown event kind → tool returns isError with `unknown event kind: <kind>`
payload does not match the schema for `kind` → `invalid payload for <kind>: ...`

tools.name: get_events
tools.description: Query the event log. Cursor on since_event_id (event id from a prior call).
side_effects: read-only SQLite query
error_modes: limit out of range (1..5000) rejected by Zod

tools.name: github.add_labels
tools.description: Add labels to an issue or PR. Gated by await_decision. Returns { ok, labels_after }.
side_effects: gated by await_decision; on approve: `gh issue edit --add-label`

tools.name: github.close_issue
tools.description: Close an issue. Optionally posts a closing comment. Gated by await_decision.
side_effects: gated by await_decision; on approve: `gh issue close`

tools.name: github.create_issue
tools.description: Create a GitHub issue. Gated by await_decision. Returns { ok, issue_url, issue_number }.
side_effects: gated by await_decision; on approve: `gh issue create`

tools.name: github.create_issue_comment
tools.description: Post a comment on an issue. Gated by await_decision. Returns { ok, comment_url }.
side_effects: gated by await_decision; on approve: `gh issue comment`

tools.name: github.create_pr
tools.description: Create a GitHub pull request. Gated by await_decision (CONFIRM tier). On approval, runs `gh pr create`. Returns { ok, pr_url, pr_number } on success.
side_effects: opens an `await_decision` (CONFIRM gate) unless a matching trust scope authorizes auto-approval
on approve: shells out to `gh pr create` and emits a `pr_opened` event
on reject/timeout: no PR created, no `pr_opened` event

tools.name: github.create_pr_comment
tools.description: Post a comment on a pull request. Gated by await_decision. Returns { ok, comment_url }.
side_effects: gated by await_decision; on approve: `gh pr comment`

tools.name: github.list_branches
tools.description: List branches in a repo (name + head sha + protection flag). Capped at 100 per call — pagination is not exposed in v1.
side_effects: shells out to `gh api repos/{repo}/branches?per_page=100` (read-only)

tools.name: github.list_commits
tools.description: List commits on a branch (defaults to the default branch).
side_effects: shells out to `gh api repos/{repo}/commits` (read-only)

tools.name: github.list_issues
tools.description: List issues for a repo. Optional label filter.
side_effects: shells out to `gh issue list --json` (read-only)

tools.name: github.list_labels
tools.description: List labels defined in a repo (name, color, description).
side_effects: shells out to `gh label list --json` (read-only)

tools.name: github.list_pr_files
tools.description: List files changed in a PR with additions / deletions per file.
side_effects: shells out to `gh pr view --json files` (read-only)

tools.name: github.list_prs
tools.description: List pull requests for a repo. Returns summaries (number, title, state, author, head/base, updatedAt).
side_effects: shells out to `gh pr list --json` (read-only)

tools.name: github.list_workflow_runs
tools.description: List GitHub Actions workflow runs for a repo. Optional workflow filter (name or filename).
side_effects: shells out to `gh run list --json` (read-only)

tools.name: github.merge_pr
tools.description: Merge a pull request. Gated by await_decision. Always squash + delete-branch in v1. Returns { ok, merged_sha }.
side_effects: opens an `await_decision` (CONFIRM gate)
on approve: shells out to `gh pr merge --squash --delete-branch`
force/non-squash variants are NEVER tier — see ADR-018

tools.name: github.read_commit
tools.description: Read commit detail (message, author, files changed, stats).
side_effects: shells out to `gh api repos/{repo}/commits/{sha}` (read-only)

tools.name: github.read_file
tools.description: Read a file from a repo at a given ref. Returns decoded text content + metadata. Binary files surface as base64 in `raw_base64`.
side_effects: shells out to `gh api repos/{repo}/contents/{path}` (read-only)

tools.name: github.read_issue
tools.description: Read a GitHub issue by repo + number.
side_effects: shells out to `gh issue view --json` (read-only)

tools.name: github.read_pr
tools.description: Read a GitHub pull request by repo + number. Returns title, body, state, head/base refs, CI status summary, files changed, mergeability.
side_effects: shells out to `gh pr view --json` (read-only)
error_modes: gh CLI not authenticated or repo not visible → `{ code: "gh_failed", ... }`

tools.name: github.read_pr_diff
tools.description: Unified diff for a PR as plain text. Truncated to 1 MiB; if truncated, `truncated: true` and `bytes_truncated` are set.
side_effects: shells out to `gh pr diff` (read-only)

tools.name: github.read_pr_review_comments
tools.description: List inline review comments on a PR (the line-by-line review comments, not issue comments).
side_effects: shells out to `gh api repos/{repo}/pulls/{n}/comments` (read-only)

tools.name: github.read_workflow_run
tools.description: Read a single GitHub Actions workflow run with job statuses.
side_effects: shells out to `gh run view --json` (read-only)

tools.name: github.remove_labels
tools.description: Remove labels from an issue or PR. Gated by await_decision. Returns { ok, labels_after }.
side_effects: gated by await_decision; on approve: `gh issue edit --remove-label`

tools.name: github.reopen_issue
tools.description: Reopen a previously closed issue. Optionally posts a comment. Gated by await_decision.
side_effects: gated by await_decision; on approve: `gh issue reopen`

tools.name: github.request_pr_review
tools.description: Request a review on a pull request from one or more reviewers. Gated by await_decision.
side_effects: gated by await_decision; on approve: `gh pr edit --add-reviewer`

tools.name: respond_to_decision
tools.description: Resolve a pending decision. If the decision has already closed via switch-default fallback, this is recorded as a decision_late_response event but does not override the fallback.
side_effects: writes the response row + publishes `decision_response`
on late reply, publishes `decision_late_response` and leaves the original fallback in place
error_modes: `already_responded` — decision already closed; late-response event is emitted instead

tools.name: subscribe_to_events
tools.description: Register this MCP session to receive notifications/event/published for the given kinds. Use ["*"] for all.
side_effects: attaches a subscription to the current MCP session (cleared when the session disconnects)
if `since_event_id` is set, replays missed events of the requested kinds to the caller
error_modes: empty kinds array rejected by Zod

tools.name: trust_scope_extend
tools.description: Extend an active scope by bumping its expiry deadline or action cap. CONFIRM-tier (gates on await_decision).
side_effects: opens an await_decision (CONFIRM gate)
on approve: bumps `expires_at` and/or `expires_after_actions`, emits `trust_scope_extended`

tools.name: trust_scope_grant
tools.description: Activate a proposed trust scope. CONFIRM-tier: opens an await_decision; on approve, flips the scope to active and emits trust_scope_granted.
side_effects: opens an await_decision (CONFIRM gate)
on approve: flips scope status `proposed → active`, emits `trust_scope_granted`

tools.name: trust_scope_list
tools.description: List trust scopes, optionally filtered by status. Auto-tier.
side_effects: sweeps wall-clock expiries before returning

tools.name: trust_scope_propose
tools.description: Propose a trust scope (auto-tier). Logs trust_scope_proposed; does NOT activate. Use trust_scope_grant to activate.
side_effects: creates a proposed trust scope row
emits `trust_scope_proposed`
error_modes: none — proposal is unconditionally accepted; activation is gated separately

args.title: Auto-merge dependabot PRs
args.description: Allow merging dependabot PRs without confirmation

tools.name: trust_scope_revoke
tools.description: Revoke an active trust scope (auto-tier escape hatch). Emits trust_scope_revoked.
side_effects: flips scope status to `revoked` immediately (no gate — escape hatch)
emits `trust_scope_revoked`

tools.name: trust_scope_status
tools.description: Full state of one trust scope including action history. Auto-tier.
side_effects: sweeps wall-clock expiries before returning
error_modes: none — unknown id returns `{ scope: null }`

tools.name: unsubscribe
tools.description: Remove kinds from this session subscription. Omit kinds to remove all.
side_effects: removes the named kinds from this session's subscription, or all kinds if omitted
error_modes: none — unsubscribing a non-subscribed kind is a no-op

tools.name: worker_dispatch
tools.description: Deliver an instruction to a running worker. Per-spawner tier — some spawners refuse dispatch entirely.
side_effects: emits `worker_dispatch_request`
effect on the worker is spawner-specific

tools.name: worker_list
tools.description: List workers, optionally filtered by type or status. Auto-tier.
side_effects: read-only orchestrator query

tools.name: worker_list_types
tools.description: List registered worker types and their spawn parameter schemas. Auto-tier.
side_effects: read-only registry lookup

tools.name: worker_spawn
tools.description: Spawn a worker of the given type. Tier comes from the spawner; confirm-tier spawners gate on await_decision. Built-in spawners (`cc`, `shell`) are CONFIRM tier.

params.description: Spawner-specific params. Either an object matching the spawner schema, or a JSON-encoded string (some MCP clients serialize unknowns to strings).

side_effects: CONFIRM-tier spawners open an await_decision first
on approve: creates a worker record + spawns the child process
emits `worker_spawned` and (for cc) a follow-up `worker_progress`/`worker_activity` stream
error_modes: spawner-specific failures (e.g. cc: git fetch/worktree errors)

tools.name: worker_status
tools.description: Full state of a single worker by id or name. Auto-tier.
side_effects: read-only
error_modes: none — unknown id_or_name returns `{ worker: null }`

tools.name: worker_terminate
tools.description: Terminate a worker. Always confirm-tier.
side_effects: sends SIGTERM (or SIGKILL if `force: true`) to the worker process
emits `worker_terminated`
cleans up the worktree if the spawner created one
